item.description:
# MacCleaner 1.1
- Added secure in-app updates powered by Sparkle. - Added automatic update checks every six hours and automatic downloads/installations. - Added an About & Updates popover with app icon, version, update controls, and live status. - Added update availability status to the app footer. - Added new cleanup, duplicate detection, photo review, cloud reclaim, startup optimization, and storage workflow improvements. - Includes the latest reliability, performance, and interface refinements.
